global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a food delivery app interface and promotional text.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Food delivery app interface
elements.description: A mockup of a food delivery app interface showing three food items with a clean design.

elements.label: Food item display
elements.description: A section of the app displaying a food item with a simple outline and no color.

elements.label: Food item display
elements.description: Another section of the app showcasing a different food item with a similar outline style.

elements.label: Small food icon
elements.description: A small circular icon representing a food item, outlined and minimalistic.

elements.label: Small food icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon representing a different food item, also outlined.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Your cravings, delivered' with a subtitle in smaller font below it.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Late-night deals available

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: A logo for 'FreshDash' in a modern font, displayed prominently at the top.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Order now' encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge in the corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching font.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content, placed in the top corner.
